violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Uncovered food throughout coolers in kitchen/back of kitchen/walk-in coolers.
Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. -Walk-in Cooler: Raw chicken stored above garlic cloves.
Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. -Clams were being unthawed without running water.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Racks in stand up Pepsi refrigerator used for chicken storage have build up and in need of cleaning--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Build up of grease above cooking area.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. -All plates on the buffet are stored in a vertical position.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Hot water handle on sink not working properly
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not clean or kept in good repair. -Employee bathroom showing damage on walls and missing tiles -Vent in employee bathroom needs cleaning

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors under dish wash machine, 3 sink system, and ceilings above cooking area in need of cleaning.
